results.rendered_html:
ālīḍha 1〉 adj. s. lih mit ā.
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Mannes gaṇa śubhrādi zu  P. 4,1,123 .
— 3〉 n. eine bes. Stellung beim Schiessen, bei der das rechte Bein vorgestellt, das linke gebogen wird,  AK. 2,8,2,53 .  H. 777 .  MED. ḍh. 7 .  MALLIN. _zu_ KUMĀRAS. 3,70 .  RAGH. 3,52 .

results.rendered_html:
ālīḍha p. p. [ā-lih kta]
1 Licked, eaten, lapped, scraped.
2 Wounded, hurt; senānyamālīḍhamivāsurāstraiḥ  R. 2. 37. 
3 Closed (as in sleep)  Dk. 117. 
— ḍhaṃ A particular attitude in shooting, the right knee being advanced and the left leg retracted; atiṣṭhadālīḍhaviśeṣaśobhinā  R. 3. 52 ; see  Malli.  on  Ku. 3. 70.
